topic_intro.text: Java is one of the most popular programming languages in the world.

basic_terms.meaning: JVM stands for Java Virtual Machine. It allows Java code to run on different operating systems.

syntax.title: Hello World

explanations.text: public class Main creates a class
main() is the entry point of Java program

revision_summary.text: Java is powerful, platform-independent, and widely used in real-world software development.
